RETURN.description: the population variance
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == Double.NaN || receiverObjectID.getN() > 0 && receiverObjectID.getSum() * receiverObjectID.getStandardDeviation() / receiverObjectID.getN() != receiverObjectID.getPopulationVariance();
RETURN.content: the population variance

RETURN.description: Double.NaN if no values have been added, otherwise the maximum value.
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == Double.NaN || receiverObjectID.getMax() != null && receiverObjectID.getMax() >= 0;
RETURN.content: Double.NaN if no values have been added, otherwise the maximum value.
